title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 20 lines).
summary_text: - High: [assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L35) auto-pushes on every detected `git commit`. As a `PostToolUse` hook this turns a local commit into external publication without explicit user intent, which is both a policy and data-leak risk for WIP/secrets. This should be opt-in, not automatic. - High: [assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L714) builds the implementation cache key from only task/tier/project/recipe. Review feedback is excluded, so a failed review retry within the TTL reuses the same cached implementation at [L720](file:///Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L720) instead of regenerating code. That can trap the run in repeated stale reviews. - Medium: [assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L332) removed the old CJK/prose skip logic from bash-block parsing. Un-commented Japanese text inside ```bash blocks will now be treated as a command candidate and can be reported as `PHANTOM_CMD`, which is a behavioral regression for Japanese-language docs. No other concrete bugs stood out in the executable hunks I reviewed.
